title: Rewrite index.css foundation — brutalist color tokens, CRT scanline, JetBrains Mono, remove radius/shadow system
acceptance_criteria: Background token set to #0A0A0A (--color-void), foreground to #EAEAEA (--color-text)
Accent color set to #E61919 (--color-accent) — the ONLY accent color
Surface token: rgba(255,255,255,0.03) (--color-surface)
Hairline tokens: rgba(255,255,255,0.08) through 0.15 (--color-hairline through --color-hairline-strong)
ALL radius tokens set to 0 — --radius-* removed or set to 0px
ALL shadow tokens removed (--shadow-*, --shadow-glow-*, --shadow-inner-*)
ALL gradient tokens removed (--color-accent-glow, etc.)
Double-bezel CSS removed: .card-doppelrand, .card-shell, .card-core, .card-doppelrand__sheen, .card-doppelrand__core all deleted
JetBrains Mono added to Google Fonts import alongside Geist
Font stacks: --font-sans: Geist; --font-display: Geist; --font-mono: JetBrains Mono
CRT scanline overlay CSS added as fixed pseudo-element or class
.bg-noise opacity changed from 0.02 to 0.04
.bg-mesh removed (no cyan gradients)
.btn-base rewritten: no border-radius, uppercase mono font-family
.btn-primary color: #E61919 background instead of white
.btn-secondary: solid border, no backdrop-blur
.nav-link rewritten: no border-radius, no accent-dim background animation
.section-eyebrow removed or replaced with ASCII bracket style
.tag: no border-radius, mono font
prefers-reduced-motion media query preserved with animation-duration: 0.001ms
Remove gradient references from .hero-video fallback
index.html: update Google Fonts href to include JetBrains Mono
